question: On what date did SDF and Circle publicly announce that CCTP was live on Stellar, and what does CCTP do with USDC?

golden.answer: SDF and Circle publicly announced CCTP live on Stellar on May 19, 2026. CCTP moves native USDC across supported chains by burning on the source chain and minting on the destination after attestation; it does not create wrapped USDC.
keyFacts: SDF and Circle's public CCTP-live announcement date is May 19, 2026.
CCTP uses native burn-and-mint USDC transfers rather than wrapped USDC.
avoid: Do NOT state May 8, 2026 as the SDF/Circle public live-announcement date without a primary source explaining a different milestone.
Do NOT describe CCTP as locking USDC and issuing a wrapped token on Stellar.
golden.notes: Corrected-fact encoding: the July recon/timeline lead said May 8, but the live SDF page date and Circle's official-post snowflake both resolve to May 19. Circle's May 18 mainnet-support milestone and the contradicted May 8 date are validation context, not completeness requirements for this question; penalize them only when a candidate asserts or merges the wrong milestone.

corroboration.claim: SDF and Circle publicly announced CCTP live on Stellar on 2026-05-19.
Circle release notes record Stellar mainnet support on 2026-05-18.
The SDF/Circle public CCTP-live announcement was 2026-05-08.

evidence.note: SDF’s May 8 article concerns regional expansion, not CCTP.
The CCTP announcement is dated May 19.

verified.by: P4 N2 primary+blind facts (Solo 3417/3423) + Terra scope audit (Solo 3633)
evidence: Sibling sweep: q-cctp-v2-usdc-stellar, q-defi-bridge-evm-to-stellar-axelar, q-token-circle-usdc-on-stellar, q-tool-cctp-stellar-integration, and q-tool-js-sdk-package contain no conflicting announcement-date claim.
